text.title: Recognition Over Recall Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: editor toolbar with icon-only buttons + multi-step form with missing summary.

example.title: Before / after
example.p: Before: 8 icon-only buttons in /editor toolbar (bold, italic, link, image, code, table, undo, redo). None on allowlist. Users hover to learn each.
After: each icon paired with a 1-2 word label ("Bold", "Italic", ...). At narrow breakpoint, collapse to icon-only with persistent tooltip ≤7 words.
Severity 2 (high friction). fix_direction: "Pair each icon with a label; tooltip ≤7 words for narrow breakpoint."

example.title: Cross-screen recall
example.p: Before: 4-step booking form: traveller details → date → seat → payment. Each step replaces the previous; users must remember chosen date when picking seat.
After: side-rail summary lists all prior selections; editable on click.
Severity 3 (blocks task for users editing prior fields). fix_direction: "Add persistent side-rail summary; clicking a row returns to that step."
